title: Windows PsExec Remote Execution
description: Detects use of PsExec or similar Sysinternals tools for remote command execution, commonly used for lateral movement in compromised networks.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*psexec.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*psexec64.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*PsExec.exe')) or ( (('Command Line' like '*psexec*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\\\*')) and ('Command Line' like '*-accepteula*') ))
